# PrusaSlicer

## Identification

Primary marker:

```gcode
; generated by PrusaSlicer 2.x.x
```

## Keys to extract

### Time

Primary:

```gcode
; estimated printing time (normal mode) = 47m 27s
```

Alternative:

```gcode
; estimated first layer printing time (normal mode) = 1m 53s
```

Use total print time. Ignore first-layer time for cost prefill.

### Filament

Primary keys:

```gcode
; filament used [mm] = 2243.91
; filament used [g] = 6.47
```

Alternative/supporting key:

```gcode
; filament used [cm3] = 5.21
```

### Layer height

```gcode
; layer_height = 0.15
; first_layer_height = 0.2
```

### Preview image

```gcode
; thumbnail begin 16x16 896
; iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAA...
; thumbnail end
```

Also seen in newer variants:

```gcode
; thumbnail_QOI begin ...
```

## Real snippet

```gcode
; generated by PrusaSlicer 2.7.4+win64 on 2025-01-12 at 09:14:33 UTC
; filament used [mm] = 2243.91
; filament used [cm3] = 5.21
; filament used [g] = 6.47
; estimated printing time (normal mode) = 47m 27s
; first_layer_height = 0.2
; layer_height = 0.15
; thumbnail begin 16x16 896
; ...base64 payload...
; thumbnail end
```

## Quirks

- Metadata often near file end, not start.
- Time stored as human-readable string, not seconds.
- Length stored in mm.
- Multiple thumbnail blocks may exist.
- Weight, length, and volume may all be present; do not derive when direct value exists.

## Confidence

High
